answers: Employees may work remotely up to 3 days per week with manager approval.
Full-time employees receive 15 vacation days per year.
Submit requests through HR portal at least 2 weeks in advance.
Q4 (Oct-Dec) requires director-level approval for vacation.
Up to 5 unused days roll over to next year, must be used in Q1.
synthesis: The company offers a flexible remote work policy (up to 3 days/week) and 15 days of annual vacation. Requests should be submitted 2 weeks in advance via the HR portal. Special director-level approval is needed for Q4 vacations, and up to 5 unused days can roll over to Q1 of the following year.
